metadata.description: Agent skills that teach AI coding assistants how to write correct Terraform HCL for Zscaler providers (ZPA, ZIA, ZTC, ZCC) — grounded in the official providers' resource catalog, examples, and known API quirks.

plugins.name: zscaler-terraform-skills
plugins.description: Use when writing, reviewing, or debugging Terraform HCL that uses any Zscaler provider (zpa, zia, ztc, zcc), or when designing the structure / CI/CD / state organization / security pipeline of a Zscaler-Terraform repository. Routes to a per-product skill (zpa-skill, zia-skill, ztc-skill, zcc-skill) for resource catalog, auth, and lifecycle quirks; routes to best-practices-skill for cross-cutting engineering discipline (state, CI/CD, secrets, testing, modules).
